mapper.select: select r.role_id, r.role_name, r.role_key, r.role_sort, r.data_scope, r.status, r.del_flag, r.remark from sys_role r inner join sys_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.role_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and r.status = '0' and r.del_flag = '0' order by r.role_sort
select role_id, role_name, role_key, role_sort, data_scope, status, del_flag, remark from sys_role where role_key = #{roleKey} and del_flag = '0'
